text.title: Testing in Go Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying testing-go must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

required.field: Paths of Go test files produced.

forbidden.pattern: No `time.Sleep` inside a test body — use `require.Eventually` or signal channels.
No `t.Parallel()` inside a subtest that mutates package-level globals.
No `assert.NoError` followed by a deref of the returned pointer — use `require`.
No bare `panic(err)` in test setup — `t.Fatalf` instead.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key (slug, id, name) before serialising.
Round numeric values to 2 decimal places when serialising.

example.note: Missing the first required field and `forbidden_seen` is non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
